ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene (e.g., mRNA, lncRNA, miRNA) */,
  "transcript_count" INTEGER /* Number of transcripts for the gene */,
  "canonical_transcript" TEXT /* ID of the canonical transcript */,
  "gene_status" TEXT /* Status of the gene (e.g., known, novel, predicted) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the gene data (e.g., Ensembl, RefSeq) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., microarray, RNA sequencing) */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "lab" TEXT /* Lab where the experiment was conducted */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol used in the experiment */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the experiment was conducted on */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the species */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments applied during the experiment */,
  "control" TEXT /* Control conditions for the experiment */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of biological replicates */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for the experiment (e.g., Illumina, Affymetrix) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, archived) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications resulting from the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression record */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "m_array_stat" REAL /* Microarray statistics */,
  "m_array_padj" REAL /* Adjusted p-value from microarray */,
  "m_array_log2fc_tcvsb6" REAL /* Log2 fold change from microarray (TC vs B6) */,
  "rna_seq_log2foldchange" REAL /* Log2 fold change from RNA sequencing */,
  "rna_seq_stat" REAL /* Statistics from RNA sequencing */,
  "rna_seq_pvalue" REAL /* P-value from RNA sequencing */,
  "rna_seq_padj" REAL /* Adjusted p-value from RNA sequencing */,
  "stat_annot" TEXT /* Statistical annotation (e.g., co_low_FC1.5, co_high_FC1.5) */,
  "expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the gene (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "normalized_expression" REAL /* Normalized expression value */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the analysis (e.g., DESeq2, EdgeR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., GO term, pathway) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "date_annotated" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the annotation (e.g., IEA, TAS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the dataset belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., microarray, RNA sequencing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, FASTQ, BAM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, lab) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is based on */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the report */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_sets" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene set */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gene set */,
  "gene_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene set */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene set was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the gene set (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "sharing" TEXT /* Sharing status (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_sets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_set_genes" (
  "gene_set_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene set gene relationship */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Any additional annotations for the gene in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_set_genes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_set_genes_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)
